summary: Tested backend (5 pytest cases) and frontend UI. Backend health/auth/CRUD all work. CRITICAL: multi-agent pipeline fails because emergentintegrations LlmChat with anthropic provider requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var; EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not being routed through Emergent's proxy. Frontend renders Login, Dashboard (compose-card, run-analysis-btn, tabs) and AnalysisView with all 8 data-testid cards correctly; navigation Dashboard->/analysis/:id works.

critical.issue: All 7 agents fail: 'litellm.AuthenticationError: Missing Anthropic API Key'. emergentintegrations.LlmChat(api_key=EMERGENT_LLM_KEY).with_model('anthropic','claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929') is calling Anthropic directly via litellm instead of routing through Emergent's universal-key gateway. Analysis status ends as 'failed' with this error. Reproduced: created analysis, polled, status='failed', error visible in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log and in UI red banner.

integration_issues.issue: All result cards show 'No data.' because backend pipeline fails (root cause is backend LLM key wiring, not frontend). UI correctly displays the failure banner.

action_items: FIX LLM wiring: emergentintegrations LlmChat with anthropic provider must use Emergent's universal-key gateway. Either (a) ensure latest emergentintegrations version that routes anthropic via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY automatically, (b) set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/base_url to Emergent proxy, or (c) switch provider to 'openai' with gpt-* model which is known to work with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Recommend web_search for current emergentintegrations API for Claude Sonnet 4.5 routing.
After fix, retest POST /api/analyses end-to-end (backend_test.py::test_full_pipeline) and verify all 7 agent_* fields are populated.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py imports OpenAISpeechToText at module load even if upload endpoint unused; fine but ensure package installed.
Background task captures full doc dict (incl. iso created_at) - OK since agents only read content/context fields.
auth.py exchange_session_id uses sync requests inside async route - blocks event loop; consider httpx AsyncClient.
models.py Analysis.created_at is datetime but server converts to isoformat before insert; mixing types could cause sort/format issues - acceptable but inconsistent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% UI rendering, integration blocked by backend

test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. Tokens generated fresh per test.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users + sessions in test_database.users / user_sessions during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses mongosh to seed sessions. The single failing test is test_full_pipeline which depends on Claude Sonnet 4.5 working via emergentintegrations. Frontend cookie domain: creator-suite-58.preview.emergentagent.com, secure=True, sameSite=None, httpOnly=True. All UI data-testids verified present.
rca of the issue: litellm under emergentintegrations is invoking AnthropicConfig().validate_environment() which requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env. The api_key passed to LlmChat is not being forwarded as Anthropic's api_key. Fix at integration layer (likely a version bump or different model_provider string).
